title: Godrej Nature's Basket is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Nature's Basket is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Nature's Basket are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Nature's Basket:
Godrej Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Nature's Basket!
